## Forms

<!-- BEGIN:generated:forms -->
### `x_804244_odm_slideshow` form

Default form for Slideshow: identity + assignment on top (with the direct player link), content and timing below.

- **Slideshow**: `name`, `assigned_account`, `active`, `public`, `player_link`, `slide_duration`, `refresh_interval`, `links`, `description`
- **Working hours**: `hours_start`, `hours_end`
<!-- END:generated:forms -->
